basic_details.job_title: Coimbatore District Court Law Officers Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 25 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Coimbatore District Court Law Officers Notification 2026 has been released on 08 June 2026 on the official website of Coimbatore District Court. A total of 25 vacancies have been announced through the Coimbatore District Court Law Officers Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: No minimum or maximum age limit is specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for exact details.

qualification.education_qualification: Advocate with not less than seven years of practice at the Bar for Public Prosecutor or Additional Public Prosecutor, Advocate with not less than ten years of practice at the Bar for Special Public Prosecutor

selection_process: Due verification of applications Selection of suitable persons for the posts
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Coimbatore District Court Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Coimbatore District Court Law Officers recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Coimbatore District Court Law Officers recruitment is 25th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Law Officers in Coimbatore District Court?
faq.answer: There are a total of 25 vacancies for Law Officers posts announced by the Coimbatore District Court in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Coimbatore District Court Law Officers recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What are the eligibility criteria for the Law Officers posts?
faq.answer: Eligibility criteria vary by post. For Public Prosecutor and Additional Public Prosecutor, candidates need to be an Advocate with at least seven years of practice. For Special Public Prosecutor, ten years of practice is required.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive as per the provided data.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Law Officers posts?
faq.answer: The salary details for the Law Officers posts are not specified in the provided data. Candidates should refer to the official notification for salary information.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the due verification of applications, followed by the selection of suitable persons for the posts.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply online for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the application process for this recruitment is offline only. Online applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Coimbatore District Court Law Officers recruitment is Ref.No.4559/2026/E1.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
